days.summary: A gentle arrival day balances Priya's slow pace with an evening for Mei.

activities.title: Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden
activities.rationale: A late, low-impact outdoor start gives Priya an easy arrival while Ravi still gets a nature stop.

activities.title: Vegetarian ramen lunch
activities.rationale: A vegetarian-friendly, casual lunch protects the group budget before the planned splurge dinner.

activities.title: Akihabara after dark
activities.rationale: This gives Mei her essential nightlife and anime evening without requiring an early start for Priya.
activities.tension: Ravi gives up a late hiking prep night.

days.summary: Ravi's hike is paired with a relaxed cultural afternoon and the trip's single splurge meal.

activities.title: Mount Takao summit trail
activities.rationale: The single early, active day satisfies Ravi's must-do while the cable car limits walking for Priya.
activities.tension: Priya compromises on one early start.

activities.title: Asakusa and Senso-ji
activities.rationale: A compact, accessible cultural stop rewards Priya's flexibility on the morning hike.

activities.title: Vegetarian kaiseki dinner
activities.rationale: This is the itinerary's one planned splurge, meeting Priya's special-dinner request while keeping other meals casual.
activities.tension: Ravi accepts one premium meal in exchange for the Mount Takao day.

days.summary: A shared city finale gives everyone a final preference match without another expensive evening.

activities.title: Tsukiji Outer Market breakfast
activities.rationale: A later breakfast keeps Priya's preferred pace while letting the whole group explore Tokyo's food culture.

activities.title: Harajuku design and shopping walk
activities.rationale: A flexible afternoon lets Priya browse at her pace while Mei stays close to the city's pop-culture scene.

activities.title: Shibuya Sky at sunset
activities.rationale: A single shared finale gives each traveler a memorable city view without adding another nightlife expense.

tradeoffs: Priya accepts one early Mount Takao start so Ravi gets his must-do hike; the cable car limits the walking burden.
Ravi accepts one premium vegetarian kaiseki dinner; every other meal stays casual to preserve the group budget.
Mei gets an Akihabara evening, while the final night stays low-cost rather than extending nightlife plans.
